name: Snow Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and powdered sugar together.
2. Work butter and vanilla together until soft.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients to the butter mixture.
4. Stir in chopped nuts.
5. Shape the mixture into balls about the size of walnuts.
6. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes.
8. While still warm, shake the balls in a bag of powdered sugar.
